---
title: Publications
description: "Peer-reviewed publications by Dr Justin C Yang and the MINDSET research programme, spanning psychiatric epidemiology, causal inference, substance use, and mental health data science."

output:
  html_document:
    keep_md: yes
---
```{r include = FALSE, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(orcidtr)
library(rcrossref)
library(tidyverse)
library(httr2)

orcid_id <- "0000-0003-2881-4906"

w <- orcid_works(orcid_id)

df <- as_tibble(w) |>
  mutate(
    year      = as.integer(substr(publication_date, 1, 4)),
    title_key = title |>
      str_to_lower() |>
      str_replace_all("[[:punct:]]", " ") |>
      str_squish(),
    is_preprint = type %in% c("preprint", "posted-content"),
    has_doi     = !is.na(doi)
  ) |>
  arrange(title_key, is_preprint, desc(has_doi), desc(year))

with_doi <- df |> filter(has_doi)
no_doi   <- df |> filter(!has_doi)

cr_cites <- with_doi |>
  mutate(
    citation = map_chr(doi, \(d) {
      tryCatch(cr_cn(dois = d, format = "text"), error = \(e) NA_character_)
    })
  )

fallback <- bind_rows(
  no_doi,
  cr_cites |> filter(is.na(citation)) |> select(-citation)
) |>
  mutate(
    citation = str_trim(paste0(
      title,
      if_else(is.na(journal) | journal == "", "", paste0(". *", journal, "*")),
      if_else(is.na(year), "", paste0(" (", year, ")."))
    ))
  )

publications <- bind_rows(
  cr_cites |> filter(!is.na(citation)),
  fallback
) |>
  mutate(
    citation = if_else(str_ends(citation, "\\."), citation, paste0(citation, ".")),
    citation = str_replace_all(citation, "Yang,\\s*J\\.\\s*C\\.", "**Yang, J. C.**"),
    citation = str_replace_all(citation, "(?<!C\\.)\\bYang,\\s*J\\.(?!\\s*C)", "**Yang, J.**")
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(year), title)

get_published_doi <- function(doi) {
  tryCatch({
    resp <- request(paste0("https://api.crossref.org/works/", URLencode(doi, reserved = TRUE))) |>
      req_headers(Accept = "application/json") |>
      req_error(is_error = \(r) FALSE) |>
      req_perform()
    if (resp_status(resp) != 200) return(NA_character_)
    body <- resp_body_json(resp)
    relations <- body$message$relation
    published <- relations$`is-preprint-of` %||% relations$`is-version-of`
    if (is.null(published) || length(published) == 0) return(NA_character_)
    published[]$id %||% NA_character_
  }, error = \(e) NA_character_)
}

excluded_preprint_dois <- c(
  "10.1101/2024.06.25.24309483",
  "10.1101/2023.03.29.23287850"
)

peer_reviewed <- publications |> filter(type == "journal-article") |>
  distinct(title_key, .keep_all = TRUE)

published_dois <- str_to_lower(peer_reviewed$doi)

book_chapters <- publications |> filter(type == "book-chapter") |>
  filter(!title_key %in% peer_reviewed$title_key) |>
  distinct(title_key, .keep_all = TRUE) |>
  mutate(
    citation = str_to_title(citation),
    citation = str_replace_all(citation, "Yang,\\s*J\\.\\s*C\\.", "**Yang, J. C.**"),
    citation = str_replace_all(citation, "(?<!C\\.)\\bYang,\\s*J\\.(?!\\s*C)", "**Yang, J.**")
  )

preprints_raw <- publications |>
  filter(type %in% c("preprint", "posted-content")) |>
  filter(!title_key %in% peer_reviewed$title_key) |>
  distinct(title_key, .keep_all = TRUE)

preprints <- preprints_raw |>
  mutate(
    published_doi = map_chr(doi, \(d) {
      if (is.na(d)) return(NA_character_)
      get_published_doi(d)
    }),
    has_published_version = (
      !is.na(published_doi) & str_to_lower(published_doi) %in% published_dois
    ) | str_to_lower(doi) %in% str_to_lower(excluded_preprint_dois)
  ) |>
  filter(!has_published_version)
```

```{r results = 'asis', echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
cat("## Peer-Reviewed Publications\n\n")
cat(paste0(peer_reviewed$citation), sep = "\r  \n")

if (nrow(book_chapters) > 0) {
  cat("\n\n## Book Chapters\n\n")
  cat(paste0(book_chapters$citation), sep = "\r  \n")
}

if (nrow(preprints) > 0) {
  cat("\n\n## Preprints\n\n")
  cat(paste0(preprints$citation), sep = "\r  \n")
}
```
